en.body:
Soulbox Villa

A five-bedroom retreat sleeping twelve — designed for groups that want full privacy and full amenity in one place. Every bedroom has its own ensuite bathroom; the social heart of the property runs from the luxury kitchen to a covered tiki bar and a large pool, with an outdoor gym tucked into the grounds.

Bedrooms

  • Bedroom 1 — Two queen beds with ensuite bathroom
  • Bedroom 2 — King bed with ensuite bathroom
  • Bedroom 3 — King bed with ensuite bathroom
  • Bedroom 4 — King bed with ensuite bathroom
  • Bedroom 5 — King bed with ensuite bathroom (includes bathtub)

Property features

  • Luxury kitchen
  • Tiki bar
  • Large pool
  • Outdoor gym

Included services

  • Concierge
en.description: Soulbox Villa is a 5-bedroom luxury retreat north of Tulum, sleeping 12, with a private pool, outdoor gym, tiki bar, and concierge service.
en.name: Villa Soulbox

en.body:
Villa Seremonia

A nine-bedroom estate in north Tulum (Región 15) sleeping twenty-eight. Built for groups that want both shared experiences and private retreats — every bedroom has its own ensuite, while the main pool, indoor/outdoor kitchen, dining, and bar areas pull the property together. Hidden underneath: an underground speakeasy.

Bedrooms

  • Bedrooms 1–4 — One king bed, ensuite bathroom (×4)
  • Bedrooms 5–9 — Two queen beds, ensuite bathroom (×5)

Property features

  • Main outdoor pool
  • Three private plunge pools
  • Indoor/outdoor kitchen, dining, and social area
  • Lounge with 80″ smart TV
  • Bar area
  • Six queen daybeds
  • Underground speakeasy
  • Pizza oven
  • Yoga area
  • Complimentary access to the public gym next door

Included services

  • Private chef
  • Concierge
  • Daily housekeeping
  • Nighttime security
en.description: Villa Seremonia is a 9-bedroom estate in north Tulum sleeping 28, with a main pool plus three private plunge pools, an underground speakeasy, an outdoor pizza oven, a yoga area, and full chef + concierge service.
en.name: Villa Seremonia

en.body:
Casa Boko

A six-bedroom retreat in the heart of Aldea Zama, sleeping sixteen. Designed for groups that want to entertain — a stunning rooftop pool sits at the top of the property, with a dedicated event space and connected indoor/outdoor dining areas at ground level.

Bedrooms

  • Bedrooms 1–2 — King bed with bathtub, ensuite bathroom (×2)
  • Bedrooms 3–4 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×2)
  • Bedrooms 5–6 — Two queen beds, ensuite bathroom (×2)

Property features

  • Stunning rooftop pool
  • Dedicated event space
  • Indoor and outdoor dining areas

Included services

  • Daily housekeeping
  • Dedicated concierge
en.description: Casa Boko is a 6-bedroom Aldea Zama villa sleeping 16, with a stunning rooftop pool, a dedicated event space, and indoor/outdoor dining areas — full concierge and daily housekeeping included.

en.body:
Casa Shalva

A six-bedroom retreat in Aldea Zama sleeping sixteen. Two pools — a spectacular rooftop pool and a second pool that opens directly off the living room. The interior reads as much like a small art gallery as a villa, with a sunken conversation pit grounding the social spaces.

Bedrooms

  • Bedroom 1 — Two king beds, ensuite bathroom
  • Bedroom 2 — Two queen beds, ensuite bathroom
  • Bedrooms 3–5 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×3)
  • Bedroom 6 — Single bunk beds

Property features

  • Spectacular rooftop pool
  • Large pool accessible from the living room
  • Art-gallery-style living room
  • Sunken conversation pit

Included services

  • Concierge
  • Housekeeping
en.description: Casa Shalva is a 6-bedroom villa in Aldea Zama sleeping 16, with a spectacular rooftop pool, a second pool off the living room, an art-gallery living space, and a sunken conversation pit.
en.name: Casa Shalva

en.body:
Casa Aviv

A four-bedroom villa in Aldea Zama sleeping eight, designed for a tight-knit group. Every bedroom carries a king bed and its own ensuite bathroom. The living room opens directly onto the property's large pool — the social spaces and the water feel like one continuous room.

Bedrooms

  • Bedrooms 1–4 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×4)

Property features

  • Large pool accessible from the living room

Included services

  • Concierge
  • Housekeeping
en.description: Casa Aviv is a 4-bedroom villa in Aldea Zama sleeping 8, with a large pool that opens directly off the living room. Concierge and housekeeping included.
en.name: Casa Aviv

es.body:
Casa Aviv

A four-bedroom villa in Aldea Zama sleeping eight, designed for a tight-knit group. Every bedroom carries a king bed and its own ensuite bathroom. The living room opens directly onto the property's large pool — the social spaces and the water feel like one continuous room.

  • Bedrooms 1–4 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×4)

es.name: Casa Aviv

en.body:
Casa Luna

A twelve-bedroom Tulum mansion sleeping forty — designed for large groups, wedding parties, and multi-family stays where everyone wants their own retreat. Two master suites with king beds and walk-in closets anchor the bedroom layout; ten additional bedrooms run the gamut from queen suites to four-person rooms with mixed bed configurations.

Bedrooms

  • Master 1–2 — King bed with walk-in closet (×2)
  • Bedroom 3 — Queen bed
  • Bedroom 4 — Queen bed with walk-in closet
  • Bedroom 5 — 2 double beds + 2 single beds + pull-out bed
  • Bedroom 6 — King bed
  • Bedrooms 7–9 — 2 double beds (×3)
  • Bedrooms 10–11 — 2 double beds (×2)
  • Bedroom 12 — 2 double beds

Property features

  • Stunning main pool
  • Huge main jacuzzi + 2 master-suite jacuzzis
  • Gym
  • Cold plunge
  • Steam room
  • Yoga room
  • Theater room with golf simulator (also doubles as a movie room)
  • Full private nightclub with DJ booth

Included services

  • Personal butler
  • Private chef
  • Dedicated concierge
  • Daily housekeeping
en.description: Casa Luna is a 12-bedroom Tulum mansion sleeping 40, with a stunning main pool, jacuzzis (main + master-suite), a wellness suite (gym, cold plunge, steam room, yoga room), a theater room with golf simulator, and a private nightclub with DJ booth. Personal butler, private chef, and dedicated concierge included.
en.name: Casa Luna

en.body:
Palacio Papaya

A seven-bedroom villa in La Veleta sleeping twenty, built for large groups who want resort-grade amenities behind one private gate. Every bedroom has its own ensuite bathroom, and the property layers three distinct pools — a rooftop pool, a large pool off the living room, and a plunge pool in the master suite — around a private pickleball court.

Bedrooms

  • Primary suite — King bed, ensuite bathroom, private plunge pool
  • Bedrooms 2–4 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×3)
  • Bedroom 5 — Two queen beds, ensuite bathroom
  • Bedrooms 6–7 — Two double beds each, ensuite bathroom (×2)

Property features

  • Spectacular rooftop pool
  • Large pool accessible from the living room
  • Plunge pool in the master suite
  • Private pickleball court

Included services

  • Personal concierge
  • Daily housekeeping
en.description: Palacio Papaya is a 7-bedroom villa in La Veleta sleeping 20, with a rooftop pool, a living-room pool, a master-suite plunge pool, and a private pickleball court. Concierge and daily housekeeping included.
en.name: Palacio Papaya

en.body:
Villa Privada

A beachfront villa in Tulum's Hotel Zone with ten ensuite suites sleeping twenty-two — a fully-staffed estate for large groups who want the sand at their doorstep and a private team running the day. The social spaces open onto a beachfront pool and deck, with a rooftop lounge above and an outdoor event space for gatherings.

Suites

  • Beachview Suites 1–2 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×2)
  • Suites 3–9 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×7)
  • Suite 10 — Two queen beds, ensuite bathroom

Property features

  • Beachfront location
  • Beachfront pool & deck
  • Plunge pool
  • Rooftop lounge area
  • Outdoor event space

Included services

  • Personal butler
  • Private chef
  • Exclusive concierge
  • Daily housekeeping
  • Security guard
en.description: Villa Privada is a beachfront 10-suite villa in the Hotel Zone sleeping 22, with a beachfront pool and deck, a rooftop lounge, and an outdoor event space. Butler, private chef, concierge, daily housekeeping, and security included.

en.body:
Hacienda Medina

A twelve-bedroom hacienda sleeping twenty-four, built as two mirrored wings — double kitchens, dining rooms, and living rooms — around a huge central pool. Every bedroom has its own ensuite bathroom, four of them with a private jacuzzi, and twin rooftop terraces each carry their own grill.

Bedrooms

  • Bedrooms 1–4 — King bed, private jacuzzi, ensuite bathroom (×4)
  • Bedrooms 5–9 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×5)
  • Bedroom 10 — Two single beds, ensuite bathroom
  • Bedrooms 11–12 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×2)

Property features

  • Huge central pool
  • Two rooftop terraces, each with a grill
  • Two dining areas seating 18
  • Two kitchens, two dining rooms, two living rooms
  • Two break rooms with TV
  • Private parking for up to 3 cars

Included services

  • Daily cleaning
  • Concierge
  • Private chef
  • Butler
  • Night security
en.description: Hacienda Medina is a 12-bedroom villa sleeping 24, with a huge central pool, two rooftop grill terraces, jacuzzis in four suites, and double kitchens, dining, and living rooms. Butler, private chef, concierge, daily cleaning, and night security included.
en.name: Hacienda Medina

es.name: Hacienda Medina

en.body:
Villa Chamana

An eight-bedroom wellness retreat in La Veleta sleeping sixteen, built around ritual and recovery as much as rest. The grounds pair a stunning pool with an ojo de agua, and the wellness program runs deep — a spa, a temazcal, a mirror temple, a gym, and a boxing ring — alongside a movie room and coworking cabins for groups balancing switching off with getting things done.

Bedrooms

  • Bedrooms 1–8 — King bed, ensuite bathroom with shower and free-standing bathtub, perfume counter (×8)

Wellness & amenities

  • Stunning pool and ojo de agua
  • Spa, temazcal, and mirror temple
  • Gym and boxing ring
  • Movie room
  • Coworking cabins

Included services

  • Butler
  • Private chef
  • Concierge
  • Daily cleaning
  • Round-trip transportation
  • Security
en.description: Villa Chamana is an 8-bedroom wellness retreat in La Veleta sleeping 16 — a stunning pool and ojo de agua, plus a spa, temazcal, gym, boxing ring, movie room, and coworking cabins. Butler, chef, concierge, daily cleaning, round-trip transport, and security included.
en.name: Villa Chamana

en.body:
16Tulum

An eight-bedroom villa in La Veleta sleeping eighteen, with a huge pool and lounge at its centre and a large space built for events. Every bedroom has its own ensuite bathroom; the primary suite adds two single beds alongside its king, making room for a family or a larger group.

Bedrooms

  • Primary suite — King bed plus two single beds, ensuite bathroom
  • Bedrooms 2–8 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×7)

Property features

  • Huge pool and lounge
  • Jacuzzi
  • Movie room with projector
  • Chef's kitchen
  • Large event space

Included services

  • Housekeeping
  • Concierge
en.description: 16Tulum is an 8-bedroom villa in La Veleta sleeping 18, with a huge pool and lounge, a jacuzzi, a projector movie room, a chef's kitchen, and a large event space. Housekeeping and concierge included.

en.body:
Villa Raes

An eight-bedroom villa in Region 8 sleeping eighteen, built for groups that want to host. Dual pools — including an upper-level plunge pool — anchor the grounds alongside an event pavilion, a cabana bar, a pickleball court, and a covered outdoor dining area served by a BBQ, grill, and pizza oven. Every bedroom has its own ensuite bathroom, and the master adds a private terrace with its own plunge pool.

Bedrooms

  • Master suite — King bed, private terrace with plunge pool, ensuite bathroom
  • Bedrooms 2–7 — King bed, ensuite bathroom (×6)
  • Bedroom 8 — Two single bunk beds, ensuite bathroom

Property features

  • Dual pools, including an upper-level plunge pool
  • Pickleball court with equipment
  • Event pavilion
  • Cabana bar
  • Outdoor BBQ, grill, and pizza oven
  • Covered outdoor dining

Included services

  • Chef service
  • Daily housekeeping
  • Concierge
en.description: Villa Raes is an 8-bedroom villa in Tulum's Region 8 sleeping 18, with dual pools (including an upper-level plunge pool), a pickleball court, an event pavilion, a cabana bar, and an outdoor BBQ kitchen with pizza oven. Chef service, daily housekeeping, and concierge included.
en.name: Villa Raes

es.name: Villa Raes

en.body:
Villa Sand

A twelve-bedroom compound in the gated Losantos community in Aldea Zama, sleeping twenty-four across four private units — two four-bedroom units and two two-bedroom penthouses, each with its own pool. Every group gets private bar and lounge space, an outdoor dining area, and a BBQ grill, while Losantos adds a massive shared pool, a fully-equipped gym, a paddle court, sundeck lounges, a dining space, and a firepit-and-grill area, all behind 24/7 security.

Bedrooms

  • Two units — four bedrooms each (eight bedrooms)
  • Two penthouses — two bedrooms each (four bedrooms)
  • Twelve bedrooms in total — eight king beds and four queen beds

Private amenities

  • Four pools — one per unit
  • Bar and lounge space
  • BBQ grill and outdoor dining area

Community amenities (Losantos)

  • Massive community swimming pool
  • Fully equipped gym
  • Paddle court
  • Sundeck and lounge areas
  • Dining space
  • Firepit and grill area
  • 24/7 security

Included services

  • Daily cleaning
  • Concierge assistance
en.description: Villa Sand is a 12-bedroom compound in Aldea Zama's gated Losantos community, sleeping 24 across two 4-bedroom units and two penthouses — four units, four private pools. Private bar and BBQ, plus a community gym, pool, and paddle court behind 24/7 security. Daily cleaning and concierge included.
en.name: Villa Sand

es.name: Villa Sand

en.body:
Villa Mao

A five-bedroom villa in the gated Losantos community in Aldea Zama, sleeping fourteen just eight minutes from the beach. A large garden pool with a lap line sits below a spectacular rooftop pool and hot tub, with a firepit, grill, lounge, and bar for the evenings and a dedicated massage suite for slower mornings. Every bedroom has its own ensuite bathroom and balcony, and the two primary suites add private jacuzzis.

Bedrooms

  • Primary suites 1–2 — King bed, private jacuzzi, ensuite bathroom, balcony (×2)
  • Suite 3 — King bed, ensuite bathroom, balcony
  • Suites 4–5 — Two queen beds each, ensuite bathroom, balcony (×2)

Amenities

  • Eight minutes from the beach
  • Large garden pool with lap line
  • Rooftop pool and hot tub
  • Firepit, grill, lounge, and bar area
  • Massage suite
  • Paddle court

Extras

  • Two fully-equipped kitchens plus pantry
  • Full-villa water purification
  • Seamless power backup
  • Parking for three vehicles
  • High-speed Wi-Fi

Included services

  • Housekeeping
  • Concierge

en.name: Villa Mao

es.body:
Villa Mao

A five-bedroom villa in the gated Losantos community in Aldea Zama, sleeping fourteen just eight minutes from the beach. A large garden pool with a lap line sits below a spectacular rooftop pool and hot tub, with a firepit, grill, lounge, and bar for the evenings and a dedicated massage suite for slower mornings. Every bedroom has its own ensuite bathroom and balcony, and the two primary suites add private jacuzzis.

Bedrooms

  • Primary suites 1–2 — King bed, private jacuzzi, ensuite bathroom, balcony (×2)
  • Suite 3 — King bed, ensuite bathroom, balcony
  • Suites 4–5 — Two queen beds each, ensuite bathroom, balcony (×2)

Amenities

  • Eight minutes from the beach
  • Large garden pool with lap line
  • Rooftop pool and hot tub
  • Firepit, grill, lounge, and bar area
  • Massage suite
  • Paddle court

Extras

  • Two fully-equipped kitchens plus pantry
  • Full-villa water purification
  • Seamless power backup
  • Parking for three vehicles
  • High-speed Wi-Fi

Included services

  • Housekeeping
  • Concierge
es.description: Villa Mao is a 5-bedroom villa in Aldea Zama's gated Losantos community, sleeping 14 just eight minutes from the beach — a lap-line garden pool, a rooftop pool and hot tub, a massage suite, and a firepit-grill-bar lounge. Housekeeping and concierge included.
